title: Define use-case error variants
scenario: The application layer can compose domain and repository errors without leaking adapter response details.
instructions: Define CreateOrderUseCaseError with Domain(CreateOrderError) and Repository(RepositoryError).

hints.body: Keep the Translating errors across boundaries code active and define CreateOrderUseCaseError with Domain(CreateOrderError) and Repository(RepositoryError).
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Define use-case error variants is shown below.

completionExplanation: Define use-case error variants now extends the active Translating errors across boundaries code with boundary usecase error. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
